value.zh: Arjun 是 HTTP 参数发现工具，可用少量分组请求识别 GET、表单 POST、JSON 与 XML 接口中的隐藏参数，并支持批量输入和结构化导出。
value.en: Arjun discovers hidden HTTP parameters with grouped requests across GET, form POST, JSON, and XML endpoints, while supporting batch input and structured result export.

value.zh: 对单个页面执行默认 GET 参数发现，先建立稳定响应基线，再缩小引起响应差异的候选参数集合。
value.en: Discover GET parameters on one endpoint by establishing a stable response baseline and narrowing candidate names that produce meaningful response differences.

value.zh: 以 Arjun 官方支持的 JSON 方法探测请求体参数，并显式声明内容类型，避免把 JSON 接口误按表单编码测试。
value.en: Probe JSON body parameters with Arjun's supported JSON method and an explicit content type so the endpoint is not mistakenly tested as form-encoded data.

value.zh: 使用指定参数字典替换内置词表，适合围绕已知业务命名约定进行低噪声发现，并保留词表版本以便复现。
value.en: Replace the built-in candidates with a chosen parameter wordlist for lower-noise discovery based on application naming conventions, retaining the wordlist version for reproduction.

value.zh: 从文件读取多个授权 URL，以稳定模式逐个探测并输出 JSON；稳定模式会降低并发以减少动态响应造成的误判。
value.en: Read authorized URLs from a file, probe them sequentially in stable mode, and write JSON output; stable mode reduces concurrency to limit false signals from dynamic responses.

value.zh: Cadaver 是命令行 WebDAV 客户端，可验证认证、目录浏览、上传与下载权限；文件操作命令需在成功建立 Cadaver 会话后执行。
value.en: Cadaver is a command-line WebDAV client for validating authentication, collection browsing, upload, and download permissions, with file commands executed inside an established session.

value.zh: 连接指定 WebDAV 集合并进入交互会话，记录 TLS、认证挑战和服务器能力响应后再继续文件权限验证。
value.en: Connect to the specified WebDAV collection and enter an interactive session, recording TLS, authentication challenges, and server capabilities before testing file permissions.

value.zh: 在已连接的 Cadaver 会话中上传单个测试文件或一组文本文件，用无害标记文件核对写入权限和目标目录映射。
value.en: Within an established Cadaver session, upload one test artifact or a set of text files to verify write permission and collection mapping with harmless marker content.

value.zh: 在交互会话中列出集合并下载明确授权的单个文件或匹配项，下载后应核对路径、大小和本地保存位置。
value.en: List the collection and download explicitly authorized single or matching files within the interactive session, then verify paths, sizes, and local destinations.

value.zh: 命令注入验证速查，按操作系统分隔符、盲注信号、Shell 解析差异与 Commix 自动化组织示例，适合在隔离靶场确认输入是否到达命令解释器。
value.en: A command-injection validation reference organized by operating-system separators, blind signals, shell parsing differences, and Commix automation for confirming interpreter reachability in an isolated lab.

value.zh: 比较 POSIX Shell 与 Windows 命令处理器对顺序、管道、条件和后台分隔符的处理，只用可观察的低影响命令确认拼接边界。
value.en: Compare how POSIX shells and Windows command processors handle sequence, pipe, conditional, and background separators using low-impact observable commands to confirm concatenation boundaries.

value.zh: 通过固定延迟以及受控 DNS、HTTP 回调验证无回显命令执行，并为每次请求使用唯一标识以区分缓存、重试和真实执行。
value.en: Validate blind execution with a fixed delay and controlled DNS or HTTP callbacks, assigning a unique marker to every request to distinguish caching, retries, and genuine execution.

value.zh: 使用 IFS、Brace Expansion、引号拼接、反斜线和通配符展示 Shell 词法差异，并以主机名文件代替高敏感数据作为测试标记。
value.en: Demonstrate shell lexical differences with IFS, brace expansion, quote joining, backslashes, and wildcards while using the hostname file as a low-sensitivity test marker.

value.zh: 让 Commix 分别处理查询参数、POST 请求体和原始请求文件；交互 Shell 模式仅在前两种检测结果已确认后使用。
value.en: Use Commix against query parameters, POST bodies, and captured raw requests, reserving interactive shell mode for cases already confirmed by lower-impact detection.

value.zh: Commix 自动检测和验证 HTTP 参数中的操作系统命令注入，支持查询串、请求体、指定参数、单次命令、交互模式和可控的过滤绕过策略。
value.en: Commix automates detection and validation of operating-system command injection in HTTP parameters across query strings, request bodies, selected parameters, one-shot commands, interactive mode, and controlled filter-bypass strategies.

value.zh: 对带有候选参数的 URL 运行默认检测流程，先确认响应稳定性和参数可控性，再根据证据决定是否进入利用阶段。
value.en: Run the default detection workflow against a URL containing a candidate parameter, confirming response stability and input control before considering any exploitation phase.

value.zh: 仅针对 POST 请求体中的 host 参数执行检测，避免把其他字段纳入探测并降低对业务逻辑的额外请求量。
value.en: Limit testing to the host field in a POST body so unrelated parameters are excluded and the additional request load on application logic stays bounded.

value.zh: 先用 os-cmd 执行低影响身份命令并记录结果，只有在授权范围需要交互验证时才切换到 os-shell 会话。
value.en: Run a low-impact identity command with os-cmd and record the result before switching to an os-shell session only when interactive validation is explicitly in scope.

value.zh: 将 Base64 Tamper 与基于时间的检测技术组合，用于复核过滤器影响；延迟信号必须通过多轮基线和对照请求确认。
value.en: Combine the Base64 tamper script with time-based detection to assess filter effects, validating any delay signal through repeated baseline and control requests.

value.zh: Dalfox v3 是基于 Rust 的 XSS 扫描与参数分析工具，支持单 URL、文件或管道输入、自定义 Payload、结构化输出、WAF 识别和盲 XSS 回调。
value.en: Dalfox v3 is a Rust-based XSS scanner and parameter analyzer supporting URL, file, and pipeline input, custom payloads, structured output, WAF fingerprinting, and blind-XSS callbacks.

value.zh: 使用 Dalfox v3 的 scan 子命令测试单个反射参数，并以 JSONL 保存已验证发现和上下文，便于后续去重与复核。
value.en: Use the Dalfox v3 scan subcommand on one reflected parameter and save verified findings with context as JSONL for later deduplication and review.

value.zh: 从文件批量读取授权 URL，静默运行并仅输出已验证、反射或分析型 PoC；输入类型显式指定以适配 Dalfox v3。
value.en: Read authorized URLs from a file, run quietly, and emit only verified, reflected, or analyzed proofs of concept, explicitly selecting file input for Dalfox v3.

value.zh: 加载经过审查的自定义 Payload，并在检测到 WAF 时启用自适应规避，同时限制全局请求速率以保持测试可控。
value.en: Load a reviewed custom payload set, enable adaptive evasion when a WAF is detected, and cap the global request rate to keep testing controlled.

value.zh: 为存储型或延迟触发场景配置唯一的盲 XSS 回调地址，并设置单目标扫描时限；回调记录需与请求标识对应。
value.en: Configure a unique blind-XSS callback for stored or delayed execution and set a per-target scan limit, correlating callback records with individual request identifiers.

value.zh: 数据库服务验证速查，覆盖 PostgreSQL、MongoDB 与 Oracle 的连接、版本、身份、权限和对象枚举，并区分客户端命令与登录后的数据库语句。
value.en: A database-service validation reference covering connection, version, identity, privilege, and object enumeration for PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Oracle while separating client commands from post-login statements.

value.zh: 连接 PostgreSQL 后收集版本、当前角色和数据库清单；PROGRAM 形式的 COPY 仅超级用户或具备相应角色时可用，必须单独记录权限前提。
value.en: Connect to PostgreSQL and collect version, current role, and database inventory, recording separately that COPY FROM PROGRAM requires superuser or an equivalent privileged role.

value.zh: 使用当前 Mongosh 客户端请求数据库清单，并用 URL 编码保留 NoSQL 风格参数名；两条命令分别验证服务暴露和应用层输入解析。
value.en: Use the current Mongosh client to request the database inventory and preserve a NoSQL-style parameter name with URL encoding, separating service exposure from application input parsing.

value.zh: 通过 Easy Connect 连接 Oracle 服务后执行只读版本、当前 Schema 表和系统权限枚举，移除不可执行的过程占位符。
value.en: Connect to Oracle with Easy Connect syntax and run read-only version, current-schema table, and system-privilege enumeration, replacing the previous non-executable procedure placeholder.

value.zh: FFUF 是高性能 HTTP 模糊测试器，可在 URL、请求体和请求头中放置 FUZZ 关键字，配合词表、匹配器、过滤器、递归和速率控制完成内容发现。
value.en: FFUF is a high-performance HTTP fuzzer that places the FUZZ keyword in URLs, bodies, or headers and combines wordlists, matchers, filters, recursion, and rate controls for content discovery.

value.zh: 将词表项替换到路径末尾的 FUZZ 标记，执行基础内容发现；先测量默认错误响应再决定需要的过滤条件。
value.en: Substitute wordlist entries at the trailing FUZZ marker for basic content discovery, measuring the default error response before choosing filters.

value.zh: 在每个候选路径后扩展 PHP、HTML 和文本后缀，同时保留无后缀请求，适合已知技术栈的文件发现。
value.en: Extend every candidate with PHP, HTML, and text suffixes while retaining the unsuffixed request, which is useful when the application stack is known.

value.zh: 把候选值置于已知 GET 参数中进行值级模糊测试，并结合响应状态、大小或内容差异识别有效输入。
value.en: Place candidate values in a known GET parameter and identify accepted input through response status, size, or content differences.

value.zh: 以 POST 表单提交每个候选用户名，同时保持其余字段固定；根据应用基线配置匹配或过滤条件，避免把统一错误页当成命中。
value.en: Submit each candidate username in a POST form while keeping other fields fixed, configuring matchers or filters from the application baseline to avoid uniform error-page false positives.

value.zh: 在 Host 请求头中替换 FUZZ 以发现未公开虚拟主机，并用默认虚拟主机的响应大小或哈希过滤重复结果。
value.en: Replace FUZZ in the Host header to discover unlisted virtual hosts and filter repeated default-vhost responses by measured size or content hash.

value.zh: 只保留指定成功与重定向状态码的响应；状态码匹配不能替代正文差异检查，仍需排除统一跳转页。
value.en: Retain responses with selected success and redirect status codes, while still checking body differences because status matching alone cannot exclude uniform redirect pages.

value.zh: 过滤已测得为 1234 字节的基线响应，适合剔除长度固定的不存在页面；动态页面应改用字数、行数或正则过滤。
value.en: Filter the measured 1,234-byte baseline response to remove fixed-length not-found pages, switching to word, line, or regular-expression filters for dynamic pages.

value.zh: 在路径末尾 FUZZ 命中目录后递归两层；FFUF 的递归要求 URL 以 FUZZ 结尾，应同时设置总时限或单任务时限。
value.en: Recurse two levels after directory matches at a trailing FUZZ marker; FFUF recursion requires that URL shape and should be bounded with an overall or per-job time limit.

value.zh: gRPC 与 WebSocket 协议测试速查，覆盖服务反射枚举、结构化 RPC 调用、双向连接验证和消息级变异，并区分明文、TLS 与认证上下文。
value.en: A gRPC and WebSocket protocol-testing reference covering reflection enumeration, structured RPC calls, bidirectional connection checks, and message mutation across plaintext, TLS, and authenticated contexts.

value.zh: 使用 grpcurl 的服务反射依次列出服务、服务方法并描述目标方法；若反射关闭，应改用服务提供方给出的 ProtoSet。
value.en: Use grpcurl server reflection to list services, list methods for one service, and describe a method, falling back to a provider-supplied ProtoSet when reflection is disabled.

value.zh: 以 JSON 请求体调用两个实验方法，先建立正常对象查询基线，再用路径样式输入检查服务端验证和授权是否位于 RPC 边界。
value.en: Invoke two lab methods with JSON bodies, establishing a normal object-query baseline before using path-shaped input to assess validation and authorization at the RPC boundary.

value.zh: 分别使用 Wscat 与 Websocat 建立 WebSocket 会话，核对握手状态、子协议、Origin 和消息方向；WSS 目标应替换为对应 TLS 地址。
value.en: Open WebSocket sessions with Wscat and Websocat to verify handshake status, subprotocol, Origin handling, and message direction, using the corresponding WSS URL for TLS targets.

value.zh: WebSocket 消息变异
value.en: WebSocket Message Mutation

value.zh: 用单消息 Websocat 会话发送正常对象请求和无害变异标记，对比响应结构、身份绑定和服务端校验，不把交互提示或 HTML 混入命令块。
value.en: Send a normal object request and a harmless mutation marker through one-message Websocat sessions, comparing response shape, identity binding, and server validation without mixing prompts or HTML into the command block.

value.zh: Java Web 应用验证工具集，覆盖 JNDI 回调、序列化流识别、Spring4Shell 模板检测和 Apache Shiro rememberMe 行为检查，并明确版本与部署前提。
value.en: A Java web-application validation toolkit covering JNDI callbacks, serialization-stream identification, Spring4Shell template checks, and Apache Shiro rememberMe behavior with explicit version and deployment prerequisites.

value.zh: 在请求头和表单字段中放置唯一 JNDI 回调标记，使用受控 DNS 或 LDAP 记录确认 Log4j 查找行为，并按请求位置关联证据。
value.en: Place unique JNDI callback markers in a header and form field, using controlled DNS or LDAP records to confirm Log4j lookup behavior and correlate evidence by request location.

patches.value:
xxd -l 4 sample.ser
file sample.ser
java -jar ysoserial.jar CommonsCollections1 "echo PAYLOADER_MARKER" > lab-payload.bin

value.zh: 先检查本地样本是否以 Java 序列化魔数 AC ED 开头，再生成只输出固定标记的实验 Payload；生成文件不等于目标存在可达 Gadget。
value.en: Check whether a local sample begins with the Java serialization magic AC ED, then generate a lab payload that only prints a fixed marker; the artifact alone does not prove a reachable gadget.

value.zh: 调用已安装 Nuclei 模板对单个授权目标检查 CVE-2022-22965，并保存模板版本和 JSONL 结果，替代原先被省略号截断的不可执行请求。
value.en: Run the installed Nuclei template for CVE-2022-22965 against one authorized target and retain template version plus JSONL output, replacing the previously truncated and non-executable request.

value.zh: 实际发送 rememberMe Cookie 并检查服务器是否回写相关 Cookie，再按需启动 Shiro 检查工具；原命令的 curl -c 仅写 Cookie Jar，不能发送 Cookie。
value.en: Send a rememberMe cookie and inspect whether the server returns a related Set-Cookie header before optionally opening the Shiro assessment tool; curl -c only writes a cookie jar and did not send the cookie.

value.zh: JWT 实现测试速查，覆盖 URL-safe Base64 解码、none 算法、HMAC 弱密钥、非对称与对称算法混淆以及 JWK 注入，并要求在目标请求中验证结果。
value.en: A JWT implementation-testing reference covering URL-safe Base64 decoding, the none algorithm, weak HMAC secrets, asymmetric-to-symmetric confusion, and JWK injection with application-level result validation.

value.zh: 按 JWT 的 Base64url 规则补齐填充并解析 Payload JSON，避免普通 base64 -d 在 URL-safe 字符或缺失填充时失败。
value.en: Pad and decode the payload with JWT Base64url rules before formatting its JSON, avoiding failures that plain base64 decoding causes with URL-safe characters or omitted padding.

value.zh: 让 jwt_tool 生成 alg=none 变体并把实验角色改为 reviewer；只有目标接受新令牌且授权结果变化时才能判定绕过。
value.en: Use jwt_tool to generate an alg=none variant with a lab role of reviewer, treating it as a bypass only if the application accepts the token and authorization behavior changes.

value.zh: 分别使用 Hashcat 16500 模式和 jwt_tool 字典模式测试 HMAC 密钥强度，保留词表来源、速率和找到的候选密钥哈希。
value.en: Assess HMAC secret strength with Hashcat mode 16500 and jwt_tool dictionary mode, retaining wordlist provenance, rate, and the hash of any recovered candidate.

value.zh: 提供验证端使用的 PEM 公钥，让 jwt_tool 构造 RS256 到 HS256 混淆变体；该测试只适用于错误复用公钥作为 HMAC 密钥的实现。
value.en: Provide the verifier's PEM public key so jwt_tool can construct an RS256-to-HS256 confusion variant, which applies only when an implementation incorrectly reuses the public key as an HMAC secret.

value.zh: 使用 jwt_tool 的 JWK 注入模式生成带自签名公钥的令牌，并通过真实受保护端点确认服务是否错误信任 Header 内嵌密钥。
value.en: Generate a token containing a self-signed embedded JWK with jwt_tool and verify against a protected endpoint whether the service incorrectly trusts header-supplied key material.

value.zh: jwt_tool 是 JWT 验证、扫描、篡改、密钥测试和签名重建工具，可解析令牌、运行 Playbook、测试已知算法弱点并在已知密钥下重签名。
value.en: jwt_tool validates, scans, tampers with, tests keys for, and re-signs JWTs, supporting token inspection, playbook scans, known algorithm checks, and signing with explicitly known key material.

value.zh: 解析令牌 Header 与 Payload，显示签名和时间声明信息；本地解码仅揭示内容，不能证明签名有效或令牌受信。
value.en: Inspect token header, payload, signature metadata, and time claims, recognizing that local decoding reveals content but does not prove signature validity or trust.

value.zh: 把令牌放入 Authorization Header，并对指定实验端点运行当前 Playbook 扫描模式；应配置成功 Canary 以减少仅凭状态码产生的误判。
value.en: Place the token in an Authorization header and run the current playbook scan against a lab endpoint, configuring a success canary to reduce conclusions based only on status codes.

value.zh: 生成 none 算法签名绕过候选令牌，用于验证服务端是否拒绝未签名 Token；生成成功本身不是漏洞证据。
value.en: Generate an unsigned none-algorithm candidate to verify whether the server rejects unsigned tokens; successful generation alone is not vulnerability evidence.

value.zh: 使用明确字典尝试恢复 HMAC 签名密钥，记录工具版本、字典哈希和耗时，并避免把非 HMAC Token 误送入字典模式。
value.en: Attempt to recover an HMAC signing secret with an explicit dictionary, recording tool version, dictionary hash, and duration while excluding non-HMAC tokens from this mode.

value.zh: 在已知实验密钥的前提下把 role 声明改为 reviewer 并以 HS256 重签名，用于核对声明级授权而非猜测密钥。
value.en: Change the role claim to reviewer and re-sign with HS256 using a known lab secret, isolating claim-level authorization behavior rather than attempting key recovery.

value.zh: Microsoft SQL Server 安全验证速查，覆盖客户端连接、xp_cmdshell 配置、服务器文件读取和 Linked Server 信任边界，并标注所需数据库角色。
value.en: A Microsoft SQL Server security-validation reference covering client connection, xp_cmdshell configuration, server-side file reads, and linked-server trust boundaries with required database roles.

value.zh: 分别使用 Impacket mssqlclient 和 Sqsh 连接 SQL Server，核对域身份、SQL 登录、TLS 与数据库上下文后再执行后续语句。
value.en: Connect to SQL Server with Impacket mssqlclient or Sqsh and confirm domain identity, SQL login, TLS, and database context before running later statements.

value.zh: 显示启用 xp_cmdshell 所需的高级配置步骤并执行低影响身份命令；测试后应恢复原配置值并记录 sysadmin 前提。
value.en: Show the advanced configuration required to enable xp_cmdshell and run a low-impact identity command, restoring original settings afterward and recording the sysadmin prerequisite.

patches.value: SELECT BulkColumn FROM OPENROWSET(BULK N'C:\Windows\win.ini', SINGLE_CLOB) AS contents;

value.zh: 使用 OPENROWSET 读取固定低敏感度系统文件，验证 SQL Server 服务账户的文件访问边界；原 BULK INSERT 示例缺少目标表定义。
value.en: Use OPENROWSET to read a fixed low-sensitivity system file and validate the SQL Server service account's file boundary, replacing a BULK INSERT example that lacked the required table definition.

value.zh: 先枚举已配置 Linked Server，再在明确目标上验证远程执行上下文，确认登录映射、权限委派和跨实例审计记录。
value.en: Enumerate configured linked servers before validating execution context on an explicit target, checking login mappings, delegated privileges, and cross-instance audit records.

value.zh: MySQL 安全验证速查，覆盖客户端连接、版本和授权枚举、LOAD_FILE、OUTFILE 与 UDF 前提，重点区分数据库权限和操作系统文件权限。
value.en: A MySQL security-validation reference covering client connection, version and grant enumeration, LOAD_FILE, OUTFILE, and UDF prerequisites while separating database privileges from operating-system file permissions.

value.zh: 先以默认 TLS 策略连接，再仅在隔离实验中使用当前 --ssl-mode=DISABLED 选项比较明文行为；旧 --ssl=0 已不适合现代客户端。
value.en: Connect first with the default TLS policy and use the current --ssl-mode=DISABLED option only in an isolated lab to compare plaintext behavior; legacy --ssl=0 is unsuitable for modern clients.

value.zh: 收集服务器版本、当前账户、数据目录、数据库清单和授权，建立后续文件操作或插件测试所需的权限与路径基线。
value.en: Collect server version, current account, data directory, database inventory, and grants to establish privilege and path prerequisites for later file or plugin checks.

value.zh: 用 LOAD_FILE 读取两个明确路径，验证 FILE 权限、服务账户文件权限和 secure_file_priv 限制；NULL 结果需结合三项条件解释。
value.en: Read two explicit paths with LOAD_FILE to assess FILE privilege, service-account filesystem access, and secure_file_priv restrictions, interpreting NULL results against all three conditions.

value.zh: 展示 INTO OUTFILE 的写入前提，并先查询 secure_file_priv；仅在一次性靶场路径写入无害标记，避免覆盖既有文件。
value.en: Show the prerequisites for INTO OUTFILE and inspect secure_file_priv first, using only a harmless marker in a disposable lab path because existing files cannot be overwritten safely.

value.zh: 枚举插件目录并说明 UDF 注册与调用链，只有在已确认文件写入、插件 ABI 和高权限账户条件时才具备可达性。
value.en: Enumerate the plugin directory and document the UDF registration and invocation chain, which is reachable only with confirmed file write, compatible plugin ABI, and elevated account privileges.

value.zh: Nikto 是 Web 服务器配置与已知文件检查器，可识别危险资源、过时组件、默认内容和响应头问题，并支持代理、插件选择和多格式报告。
value.en: Nikto checks web-server configuration and known resources for dangerous files, outdated components, default content, and response-header issues, with proxying, plugin selection, and multi-format reports.

value.zh: 对指定 HTTPS 主机运行默认测试集合，记录 Nikto 数据库版本、目标虚拟主机和开始时间，以便解释签名型发现。
value.en: Run Nikto's default test set against an HTTPS host while recording database version, target virtual host, and start time so signature-based findings remain interpretable.

value.zh: 强制在 8443 端口使用 TLS，适合服务未运行在默认 443 端口的情况；扫描前应先确认 SNI 与虚拟主机。
value.en: Force TLS on port 8443 for a service outside the default HTTPS port, confirming SNI and the intended virtual host before scanning.

value.zh: 通过本地 HTTP 代理转发 Nikto 请求，便于在 Burp 中检查实际请求和响应；代理日志可能包含认证信息，应按测试证据管理。
value.en: Route Nikto traffic through a local HTTP proxy for inspecting actual requests and responses in Burp, handling proxy logs as evidence because they may contain authentication material.

value.zh: 仅运行 Nikto 的 outdated 插件以缩小测试范围；可先用 -list-plugins 查看当前安装版本提供的准确插件名称。
value.en: Run only Nikto's outdated plugin to narrow scope, using -list-plugins first when necessary to confirm the exact plugin name in the installed release.

value.zh: 把扫描结果保存为 HTML 报告，文件扩展名和 -Format htm 保持一致，并连同 Nikto 版本与数据库日期一起归档。
value.en: Save results as an HTML report with an extension matching -Format htm, archiving it together with the Nikto version and signature-database date.

value.zh: OAuth 2.0 与 OpenID Connect 安全验证速查，覆盖 Redirect URI、PKCE、浏览器泄露面、JWT kid 处理和客户端凭据强度，并区分授权端点与令牌端点。
value.en: An OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect security-validation reference covering redirect URIs, PKCE, browser leakage surfaces, JWT kid handling, and client-credential strength across authorization and token endpoints.

value.zh: 向授权端点提交未注册的外部 Redirect URI 以及经站内开放重定向嵌套的地址，确认服务是否执行精确匹配和安全的重定向解析。
value.en: Submit an unregistered external redirect URI and a URI nested through an on-site redirect to verify exact matching and safe redirect parsing at the authorization endpoint.

value.zh: 在实验授权码交换中故意省略 code_verifier，确认令牌端点拒绝请求；必须使用绑定了 S256 Challenge 的一次性授权码。
value.en: Intentionally omit code_verifier during a lab authorization-code exchange and confirm rejection, using a one-time code that was originally bound to an S256 challenge.

value.zh: 检查回调响应的 Referrer-Policy、Cache-Control 和 Location，识别授权码可能进入外部导航或缓存的条件；curl 本身不会模拟浏览器 Referer 生成。
value.en: Inspect Referrer-Policy, Cache-Control, and Location on the callback response to identify code leakage into navigation or caches, noting that curl itself does not model browser Referer generation.

value.zh: 使用 jwt_tool 的 Header 注入模式分别测试 kid 的 SQL 片段和路径片段，结果必须由签名验证变化或服务端错误证据确认。
value.en: Use jwt_tool header injection mode with SQL-shaped and path-shaped kid values, confirming impact through signature-validation changes or correlated server-side errors.

value.zh: 以小型受控候选集验证实验客户端是否使用弱 Secret，并仅在响应真正返回访问令牌时记录命中；同时限制速率和重试次数。
value.en: Test a small controlled candidate set against a lab client secret and record a hit only when a token is actually returned, while bounding request rate and retry count.

value.zh: PHP 应用安全验证速查，覆盖 Stream Wrapper 文件包含、对象反序列化、版本相关的弱类型比较和 PHPGGC Gadget 生成，并标注框架版本与依赖前提。
value.en: A PHP application-security reference covering stream-wrapper file inclusion, object deserialization, version-dependent loose comparisons, and PHPGGC gadget generation with framework and dependency prerequisites.

value.zh: 比较目录遍历、php://filter 和 data:// 三类包含输入，分别验证路径约束、源码编码读取和 Stream Wrapper 配置，不把任一响应异常直接等同于执行。
value.en: Compare traversal, php://filter, and data:// inclusion inputs to test path constraints, encoded source reads, and stream-wrapper configuration without treating every anomalous response as code execution.

value.zh: 展示原生序列化与 PHPGGC 生成 POP Chain 的差异；只有目标框架包含匹配 Gadget 且不可信数据进入 unserialize 时才可能到达。
value.en: Contrast native serialization with PHPGGC-generated POP chains, which are reachable only when the target contains a matching gadget and untrusted data reaches unserialize.

value.zh: 在当前 PHP 运行时直接观察数字与非数字字符串、两个科学计数法样式字符串的宽松比较结果，避免沿用 PHP 8 已改变或会抛 TypeError 的旧示例。
value.en: Observe loose-comparison results for numeric versus nonnumeric strings and two scientific-notation-shaped strings in the installed PHP runtime, avoiding legacy examples changed by PHP 8 or converted to TypeError.

value.zh: 先列出当前 PHPGGC 支持的 Chain，再为明确框架和版本生成实验命令 Payload；输出编码只改变传输形式，不会创造缺失的 Gadget。
value.en: List chains supported by the installed PHPGGC release before generating a lab command payload for a specific framework and version; output encoding does not create a missing gadget.

value.zh: 面向隔离靶场的 Python 网络测试脚本模板，涵盖低速 HTTP 内容发现、有限端口连接、参数差异比较和路径遍历验证，并强调超时、编码与异常处理。
value.en: Python network-testing templates for isolated labs covering rate-conscious HTTP discovery, bounded port connections, parameter differential checks, and traversal validation with explicit timeouts, encoding, and error handling.

value.zh: 逐行读取内容发现词表并对每个路径设置请求超时，只打印非统一 403/404 响应；实际使用时还应复用 Session 并限制词表范围。
value.en: Read a content-discovery list line by line, apply a request timeout, and print responses outside uniform 403 or 404 handling, with a bounded list and reusable Session for real runs.

value.zh: 使用线程池并发尝试 TCP 连接并为每个 Socket 设置短超时；应把端口范围缩小到授权清单并在成功和异常路径都关闭描述符。
value.en: Attempt TCP connections through a thread pool with a short per-socket timeout, constraining ports to the authorized list and closing descriptors on both success and exception paths.

value.zh: 将一组 SQL 形状输入作为查询参数发送，比较响应长度和耗时；单次延迟或长度变化只是候选信号，需要重复基线与服务端日志确认。
value.en: Send SQL-shaped values as a query parameter and compare response length plus elapsed time, treating one delay or size change only as a candidate that needs repeated controls and server logs.

value.zh: 依次提交编码不同的路径遍历候选，并只在响应包含固定实验标记时报告；生产验证应避免依赖真实系统账户文件内容。
value.en: Submit traversal candidates with different encodings and report only a fixed lab marker in the response, avoiding dependence on real operating-system account-file content in production validation.

value.zh: Redis 服务安全审计命令集，使用只读连接、持久化配置、ACL 和 Lua/Module 能力检查替代写入 SSH Key、Crontab 或 WebShell 的破坏性流程。
value.en: A Redis service-security audit set using read-only connectivity, persistence configuration, ACL, and Lua or module capability checks instead of destructive SSH-key, crontab, or web-shell writes.

value.zh: 连接与身份基线
value.en: Connectivity and Identity Baseline

patches.value:
redis-cli -h {TARGET} PING
redis-cli -h {TARGET} INFO server
redis-cli -h {TARGET} ACL WHOAMI

value.zh: 验证 Redis 是否可达，读取服务器版本信息并查询当前 ACL 身份；PING 成功只能证明连接，不代表匿名账户具有高权限。
value.en: Verify Redis reachability, read server version metadata, and query the current ACL identity; a successful PING proves connectivity but not that an anonymous account is privileged.

value.zh: 持久化配置审计
value.en: Persistence Configuration Audit

patches.value:
redis-cli -h {TARGET} CONFIG GET dir
redis-cli -h {TARGET} CONFIG GET dbfilename
redis-cli -h {TARGET} CONFIG GET appendonly
redis-cli -h {TARGET} INFO persistence

value.zh: 只读检查快照目录、文件名、AOF 开关和持久化状态，用于判断写盘暴露面；命令不会修改目录、文件名或数据库内容。
value.en: Read snapshot directory, filename, AOF setting, and persistence status to assess disk-write exposure without changing paths, filenames, or database content.

value.zh: ACL 权限审计
value.en: ACL Privilege Audit

patches.value:
redis-cli -h {TARGET} ACL WHOAMI
redis-cli -h {TARGET} ACL GETUSER default
redis-cli -h {TARGET} ACL CAT dangerous

value.zh: 查看当前身份、default 用户规则和 dangerous 命令分类，确认高风险命令是否被 ACL 限制；不创建用户或更改权限。
value.en: Inspect the current identity, default-user rules, and the dangerous command category to verify ACL restrictions without creating users or changing privileges.

value.zh: 脚本与模块能力检查
value.en: Scripting and Module Capability Check

patches.value:
redis-cli -h {TARGET} EVAL "return redis.call('PING')" 0
redis-cli -h {TARGET} MODULE LIST

value.zh: 用只返回 PONG 的 Lua 脚本验证 EVAL 权限，并列出已加载模块；两项结果用于评估扩展能力，不写文件也不改变键空间。
value.en: Test EVAL permission with a Lua script that only returns PONG and list loaded modules, assessing extension capabilities without writing files or changing the keyspace.

value.zh: Smuggler 是 Python 3 HTTP Request Smuggling 与 Desync 检测器，通过可配置 Transfer-Encoding 变体识别 CL.TE、TE.CL 等候选，并保存原始二进制请求供复核。
value.en: Smuggler is a Python 3 HTTP request-smuggling and desynchronization detector that applies configurable Transfer-Encoding mutations, reports CL.TE or TE.CL candidates, and saves raw binary requests for review.

value.zh: 对单个 HTTPS 端点运行默认快速变体集，记录超时和生成的 Payload 文件；工具命中可能是假阳性，必须通过独立连接复核。
value.en: Run the default fast mutation set against one HTTPS endpoint and retain timeouts plus generated payload files, independently reproducing any hit because the tool can report false positives.

value.zh: 以 POST 方法和 doubles 变体配置运行更深入的检测并写入日志；原命令把 -t 错当技术选择，而官方 -t 实际表示 Socket 超时。
value.en: Run a deeper check with the POST method and doubles mutation configuration while writing a log; the previous command misused -t as a technique selector although it is the socket timeout.

value.zh: 从标准输入逐行读取授权 URL 批量运行默认检查，适合预先去重并限定 Scope 的目标文件；每个候选仍需单独复现。
value.en: Read authorized URLs from standard input for batch default checks after deduplicating and constraining scope, reproducing every candidate separately.

value.zh: SQL 注入进阶验证速查，覆盖 DNS/HTTP 带外信号、二次注入触发、JSON 请求载体和 MSSQL xp_cmdshell 配置，并区分数据库方言与权限前提。
value.en: An advanced SQL-injection validation reference covering DNS or HTTP out-of-band signals, second-order triggers, JSON request carriers, and MSSQL xp_cmdshell configuration across database dialects and privilege prerequisites.

value.zh: 展示 MySQL、MSSQL 和 Oracle 产生外部名称解析或 HTTP 请求的不同语法，每次使用唯一回调标签以证明数据库侧交互。
value.en: Show database-specific syntax for MySQL, MSSQL, and Oracle to produce external name resolution or HTTP requests, using a unique callback label for each database-side interaction.

value.zh: 先把带引号的无害标记存入实验账户，再调用会读取该值并构造新查询的功能；二次注入必须由第二阶段行为或数据库日志确认。
value.en: Store a harmless quote-bearing marker in a lab account and then invoke a feature that reads the value into another query, confirming second-order injection only from second-stage behavior or database logs.

value.zh: 分别在 JSON 字符串和 URL 查询参数中发送带引号的标记，比较解析错误、数据库错误和正常基线；JSON 字段本身并不等同于 SQL JSON 列。
value.en: Send quote-bearing markers in a JSON string and URL query parameter, comparing parser errors, database errors, and the normal baseline rather than equating JSON transport with a SQL JSON column.

value.zh: 显示启用 xp_cmdshell 并执行身份命令的完整 MSSQL 配置链；需要 sysadmin 权限，测试后应恢复原配置并保留审计记录。
value.en: Show the complete MSSQL configuration chain for enabling xp_cmdshell and running an identity command, requiring sysadmin rights and restoration of original settings with audit evidence.

value.zh: SSRF 验证速查，覆盖回环与 IPv6 探测、地址表示差异、Gopher 协议的只读 PING 以及云元数据边界，并强调回调证据和 Header 前提。
value.en: An SSRF validation reference covering loopback and IPv6 probes, alternate address representations, a read-only Redis PING over Gopher, and cloud-metadata boundaries with callback and header prerequisites.

value.zh: 通过同一 fetch 参数分别请求回环 HTTP、SSH 端口、IPv6 回环和唯一外部回调，比较状态、耗时与 OAST 记录以确认服务端发起请求。
value.en: Use one fetch parameter to request loopback HTTP, an SSH port, IPv6 loopback, and a unique external callback, comparing status, timing, and OAST evidence to confirm server-side requests.

value.zh: 用十进制、十六进制和缩写形式表示同一回环地址，验证 URL 规范化是否在允许列表判断之前完成，避免依赖已停止或外部控制的通配 DNS。
value.en: Represent the same loopback address in decimal, hexadecimal, and shortened forms to verify normalization before allowlist decisions without relying on discontinued or externally controlled wildcard DNS.

value.zh: 通过 Gopher 向本地 Redis 编码一条只读 RESP PING，用于判断任意协议转发能力，替代原先会 FLUSHALL 且依赖 Python 2 Gopherus 的示例。
value.en: Encode one read-only RESP PING over Gopher to a local Redis service to assess arbitrary-protocol forwarding, replacing the destructive FLUSHALL and Python 2 Gopherus example.

value.zh: 将 AWS、Google Cloud 和 Azure 元数据地址作为实验 fetch 输入；IMDSv2、Metadata-Flavor 与 Metadata Header 会阻止缺少自定义 Header 的简单 SSRF。
value.en: Supply AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure metadata addresses to a lab fetch endpoint, recognizing that IMDSv2, Metadata-Flavor, and Metadata headers block simple SSRF primitives that cannot set headers.

value.zh: 高级 Web 验证速查，覆盖多模板引擎表达式、DOM XSS Source/Sink、GraphQL 查询边界和 HTTP Desync 检测，并把无害识别与利用阶段分开。
value.en: An advanced web-validation reference covering template-engine expressions, DOM XSS sources and sinks, GraphQL query boundaries, and HTTP desynchronization checks while separating harmless identification from exploitation.

value.zh: 分别提交 Jinja/Twig、FreeMarker 和 ERB 风格的算术表达式，以固定结果 49 识别模板求值；表达式命中不代表可执行系统命令。
value.en: Submit arithmetic expressions in Jinja or Twig, FreeMarker, and ERB styles and look for the fixed result 49, recognizing that expression evaluation does not itself prove command execution.

value.zh: 在前端源码中定位常见 DOM 输入源与危险 Sink 赋值，再沿真实数据流确认编码、净化和 DOM 上下文，而不是只凭关键词判定 XSS。
value.en: Locate common DOM inputs and dangerous sink assignments in frontend source, then trace real data flow through encoding, sanitization, and DOM context instead of declaring XSS from keywords alone.

patches.value:
curl --silent --show-error -X POST "https://{TARGET}/graphql" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"query":"query UserSummary { users { id username } }"}'
curl --silent --show-error -X POST "https://{TARGET}/graphql" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"query":"query OrderOwner { orders { id user { id username } } }"}'

value.zh: 发送两个语法完整、深度受限的 GraphQL 查询，比较用户与订单关联字段的授权裁剪；避免原示例中不可执行的 x1000 伪语法。
value.en: Send two syntactically complete and depth-bounded GraphQL queries to compare authorization trimming across user and order relationships, replacing the non-executable x1000 pseudo-syntax.

value.zh: 使用 Smuggler 的 exhaustive 变体集和显式 Socket 超时检查 Desync 候选，替代 curl 无法精确保留冲突帧边界的伪造 CL/TE 示例。
value.en: Use Smuggler's exhaustive mutation set with an explicit socket timeout to find desynchronization candidates, replacing curl examples that could not preserve conflicting framing boundaries accurately.

value.zh: REST 与 GraphQL API 安全测试命令集，覆盖 HTTPie 基线请求、对象级授权、批量赋值、版本路径和 JWT 验证，强调使用低权限实验身份对照。
value.en: A REST and GraphQL API security-testing set covering HTTPie baselines, object-level authorization, mass assignment, version paths, and JWT validation with controlled low-privilege identities.

value.zh: 使用 HTTPie 分别发送带 Bearer Token 的 GET、登录 POST 和对象 PUT 请求，核对方法、JSON 序列化、认证 Header 与返回状态。
value.en: Use HTTPie for an authenticated GET, login POST, and object PUT request while verifying methods, JSON serialization, authorization headers, and response status.

patches.value: for i in {1..20}; do curl --silent --output /dev/null --write-out "$i %{http_code}\n" "https://api.target.com/users/$i" -H 'Authorization: Bearer {LOW_PRIV_TOKEN}'; sleep 0.2; done

value.zh: 以低权限令牌按有限 ID 范围请求用户对象并加入间隔，比较本人、其他用户和不存在对象的状态与响应，不把 200 单独视为越权。
value.en: Request a bounded range of user objects with a low-privilege token and pacing, comparing self, other-user, and nonexistent responses rather than treating HTTP 200 alone as an authorization bypass.

value.zh: 向个人资料更新接口加入 role、is_admin 和 balance 等服务器管理字段，确认它们被拒绝或忽略，并在测试前保存实验账户基线。
value.en: Add server-managed role, is_admin, and balance fields to a profile update, confirming rejection or omission after saving the lab account's baseline state.

value.zh: 以有限候选枚举 API 版本路径并输出每个路径的状态码，用于发现并行部署或遗留版本；命中后还需比较认证和 Schema。
value.en: Enumerate a bounded set of API version paths and print each status code to find parallel or legacy deployments, then compare authentication and schemas for any hit.

patches.value: python3 jwt_tool.py -t "https://{TARGET}/api" -rh "Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}" -X a -I -pc role -pv reviewer

value.zh: 使用 jwt_tool 正确生成 Base64url 编码的 alg=none 变体，并把角色改为 reviewer；只有 API 接受 Token 且授权发生变化才算有效。
value.en: Use jwt_tool to generate a correctly Base64url-encoded alg=none variant with a reviewer role, requiring token acceptance and changed API authorization before recording impact.

value.zh: Web 认证与授权边界验证速查，覆盖登录查询参数、代理来源 Header、服务器管理字段和路径规范化，并用完整 HTTP 请求替代不可执行的散装片段。
value.en: A web authentication and authorization-boundary reference covering login query inputs, proxy-origin headers, server-managed fields, and path normalization with complete HTTP requests instead of loose fragments.

value.zh: 以完整表单请求提交两种 SQL 形状用户名，并与无效账户基线比较 Cookie、跳转和正文；仅凭错误消失不能判定登录绕过。
value.en: Submit two SQL-shaped usernames in complete form requests and compare cookies, redirects, and bodies with an invalid-account baseline rather than treating a missing error as login bypass.

value.zh: 逐次单独发送三个常见客户端地址 Header，并与无 Header 请求比较；只有受信反向代理应能设置来源身份，应用不应直接信任外部输入。
value.en: Send three common client-address headers one at a time and compare with a header-free control, confirming that only a trusted reverse proxy can establish source identity.

value.zh: 尝试在个人资料更新中加入服务器管理的 role 字段，再以同一低权限会话访问管理端点，确认字段被忽略且权限保持不变。
value.en: Add a server-managed role field to a profile update and then access an administrative endpoint with the same low-privilege session to confirm the field is ignored and privileges remain unchanged.

value.zh: 对大小写、百分号编码、点段和重复斜线形式发送相同 HEAD 请求，比较网关与应用规范化后是否执行一致的认证与授权。
value.en: Send equivalent HEAD requests using case changes, percent encoding, dot segments, and duplicate slashes to compare authentication and authorization after gateway and application normalization.

value.zh: Web 缓存与 CDN 验证工具集，覆盖源站线索、缓存命中基线、未键控 Header 和请求体参与缓存键的行为，并要求使用唯一标记避免污染共享内容。
value.en: A web-cache and CDN validation toolkit covering origin clues, cache-hit baselines, unkeyed headers, and request-body participation in cache keys while using unique markers to avoid contaminating shared content.

value.zh: 结合当前 DNS、历史 A 记录、证书搜索和直连子域名寻找可能的源站线索；任何候选都必须通过证书、Host 路由和内容哈希交叉验证。
value.en: Combine current DNS, historical A records, certificate search, and direct subdomains to find possible origin clues, validating every candidate through certificates, Host routing, and content hashes.

value.zh: 以不同查询标记发送控制请求和单 Header 变异请求，比较 Age、X-Cache、Cache-Control 与响应定位信息；使用 GET 而非可能走不同缓存路径的 HEAD。
value.en: Send control and single-header mutation requests with distinct query markers, comparing Age, X-Cache, Cache-Control, and response locations while using GET instead of a potentially separate HEAD cache path.

value.zh: 分别测试 GET 请求体、X-Original-URL 和 X-Rewrite-URL 是否影响响应但未进入缓存键，每个变体使用独立查询标记以隔离缓存对象。
value.en: Test whether a GET body, X-Original-URL, or X-Rewrite-URL changes responses without entering the cache key, assigning a separate query marker to isolate every cache object.

value.zh: 常见 CMS 识别与漏洞扫描速查，分别使用 WPScan、Droopescan 和 MageScan 检查 WordPress、Joomla、Drupal 与 Magento，并移除来源不明的历史利用脚本。
value.en: A common-CMS identification and vulnerability-scanning reference using WPScan, Droopescan, and MageScan for WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, and Magento while removing unversioned historical exploit scripts.

value.zh: 枚举已知漏洞插件、主题和用户，并用 WPScan API Token 解析漏洞元数据后输出 JSON；避免默认进行密码猜测或 XML-RPC 爆破。
value.en: Enumerate vulnerable plugins, themes, and users with WPScan vulnerability metadata and JSON output, deliberately excluding password guessing and XML-RPC brute force from the default workflow.

value.zh: 使用 Droopescan 的 Joomla 模式识别版本、组件和可见路径，保留扫描器指纹证据并去掉未固定版本的 joomblah.py。
value.en: Use Droopescan's Joomla mode to identify versions, components, and visible paths while retaining fingerprint evidence and removing the unversioned joomblah.py script.

value.zh: 使用 Droopescan 的 Drupal 模式收集版本和模块线索，先验证组件版本再映射 CVE，避免直接运行来源与适用版本不明的 Drupalgeddon 脚本。
value.en: Use Droopescan's Drupal mode to collect version and module clues, validating component versions before mapping CVEs instead of running an unversioned Drupalgeddon script.

value.zh: 用固定下载的 MageScan PHAR 执行 Magento 全量识别检查，记录 PHAR 哈希和版本；结果用于版本与配置复核，不自动转入 SQLMap。
value.en: Run all Magento identification checks with a pinned MageScan PHAR and record its hash plus version, using results for version and configuration review without automatically chaining into SQLMap.

value.zh: 跨平台反序列化验证工具集，覆盖 Java ysoserial、PHPGGC、Python Pickle 和 ysoserial.net ViewState，并使用固定本地标记说明 Gadget 前提与格式差异。
value.en: A cross-platform deserialization validation toolkit covering Java ysoserial, PHPGGC, Python Pickle, and ysoserial.net ViewState with fixed local markers and explicit gadget prerequisites.

patches.value:
java -jar ysoserial.jar CommonsCollections1 "echo PAYLOADER_MARKER" > cc1-payload.bin
java -jar ysoserial.jar CommonsCollections6 "echo PAYLOADER_MARKER" > cc6-payload.bin
java -jar ysoserial.jar Spring1 "echo PAYLOADER_MARKER" | base64 -w 0

value.zh: 为三个明确 Java Gadget Chain 生成只输出本地标记的序列化对象，并分别保存二进制或 Base64 结果；目标必须包含对应依赖版本。
value.en: Generate serialized objects for three explicit Java gadget chains using only a local marker command and save binary or Base64 output, requiring matching dependency versions on the target.

patches.value:
phpggc -l
phpggc Laravel/RCE1 system "echo PAYLOADER_MARKER"
phpggc -b Slim/RCE1 exec "echo PAYLOADER_MARKER"

value.zh: 列出当前 PHPGGC Chain 后生成 Laravel 与 Slim 的本地标记对象，其中 -b 只负责 Base64 编码；生成结果需与目标框架版本匹配。
value.en: List chains in the installed PHPGGC release before generating local-marker objects for Laravel and Slim, noting that -b only Base64-encodes output and the target version must match.

value.zh: 创建一个反序列化时只打印固定标记的 Pickle 对象并输出十六进制，演示 __reduce__ 调用语义而不启动系统命令或网络连接。
value.en: Create a Pickle object that only prints a fixed marker when deserialized and emit its hexadecimal form, demonstrating __reduce__ semantics without starting a system command or network connection.

value.zh: 使用 ysoserial.net 为指定 ASP.NET 路径和已知 Machine Key 生成 ViewState 本地标记，修正 Windows 平台上无效的 id 命令。
value.en: Use ysoserial.net to generate a ViewState local marker for a specific ASP.NET path and known machine keys, replacing the invalid Unix id command on Windows.

value.zh: HTTP 安全响应头验证工具集，检查 CSP、HSTS、X-Content-Type-Options、Referrer-Policy、Permissions-Policy 和框架保护，并把已废弃 Header 与现代基线分开。
value.en: An HTTP security-header validation toolkit covering CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and framing protections while separating deprecated headers from the modern baseline.

value.zh: 用 curl 提取现代安全头，再用 shcheck 进行规则化分析；移除已废弃的 X-XSS-Protection，且应同时检查 CSP frame-ancestors。
value.en: Extract modern security headers with curl and analyze them with shcheck, excluding deprecated X-XSS-Protection while also reviewing CSP frame-ancestors.

value.zh: 分别检查站点返回的 Strict-Transport-Security 值和 HSTS Preload 状态，核对 max-age、includeSubDomains 与 preload 指令是否符合部署范围。
value.en: Inspect the site's Strict-Transport-Security value and HSTS preload status, checking max-age, includeSubDomains, and preload against the intended deployment scope.

value.zh: 提取生效的 Content-Security-Policy Header，检查 nonce、hash、default-src 回退以及 unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval，报告模式 Header 需另行收集。
value.en: Extract the enforced Content-Security-Policy header and review nonces, hashes, default-src fallback, unsafe-inline, and unsafe-eval, collecting report-only policy separately.

value.zh: Wfuzz Web 模糊测试工具，可通过 Payload Provider 在路径、参数、表单和 Header 中替换 FUZZ/FUZ2Z，并按状态、长度与递归深度过滤结果。
value.en: Wfuzz is a web fuzzer that uses payload providers to replace FUZZ and FUZ2Z in paths, parameters, forms, and headers, with status, length, and recursion-based filtering.

value.zh: 使用文件型 Payload Provider 枚举路径并隐藏 404，扫描前应测量自定义错误页，避免仅依赖状态码过滤。
value.en: Enumerate paths with a file payload provider and hide 404 responses, first measuring custom error pages instead of relying on status filtering alone.

value.zh: 将参数名字典替换到查询键位置，并隐藏空响应体，适合发现服务接受但文档未列出的参数名称。
value.en: Substitute a parameter-name list into the query key and hide empty bodies to discover accepted parameter names that are absent from documentation.

value.zh: 用两个独立文件 Provider 组合实验用户名和密码并隐藏 403，FUZ2Z 引用第二个 Provider；应限制候选数量和请求速率。
value.en: Combine lab usernames and passwords from two file providers while hiding 403 responses, with FUZ2Z referencing the second provider and the candidate set plus rate explicitly bounded.

value.zh: 把子域词表替换到 Host Header 并请求固定 HTTPS 地址，用默认虚拟主机的状态、长度和标题排除统一响应。
value.en: Substitute subdomain candidates into the Host header while requesting a fixed HTTPS address, filtering the default virtual host by status, length, and title.

value.zh: Wfuzz 基础命令速查，覆盖路径、状态过滤、POST 表单、Cookie、Host Header 与递归发现，适合快速验证单个 FUZZ 标记位置。
value.en: A basic Wfuzz command reference covering paths, status filtering, POST forms, cookies, Host headers, and recursive discovery for quickly validating one FUZZ marker location.

value.zh: 从词表读取候选并替换 URL 路径中的 FUZZ，彩色输出所有默认匹配；需要依据目标错误页另加过滤器。
value.en: Read candidates from a wordlist and replace FUZZ in the URL path with colored output, adding filters based on the target's measured error page.

value.zh: 在路径发现基础上隐藏 HTTP 404 响应，适用于真实不存在页面确实返回 404 的服务；软 404 需改用长度或字数过滤。
value.en: Hide HTTP 404 responses during path discovery when missing resources genuinely use that status, switching to length or word filters for soft 404 pages.

value.zh: 把词表值放入 POST 表单的 user 字段并保持 pass 固定，比较响应而不是默认进行无限制凭据猜测。
value.en: Place wordlist values in the POST form's user field while keeping pass fixed, comparing responses rather than performing unbounded credential guessing.

value.zh: 在 session Cookie 值中替换 FUZZ，验证会话解析边界；候选应使用实验令牌格式，避免发送真实会话材料。
value.en: Replace FUZZ in a session cookie value to test session-parsing boundaries, using lab-token shapes rather than real session material.

value.zh: 在 Host Header 的子域部分替换 FUZZ，发现同一地址上的虚拟主机，并按默认站点响应特征过滤结果。
value.en: Replace FUZZ in the subdomain portion of the Host header to discover virtual hosts on one address and filter results by the default-site response signature.

value.zh: 对命中的目录继续递归两层并复用同一词表，运行前限制 Scope、线程和总请求量，防止目录树导致任务失控。
value.en: Recurse two levels beneath matching directories with the same wordlist, bounding scope, threads, and total requests before a large directory tree expands the job.

value.zh: XSS 测试工具集，结合 XSStrike 的上下文分析、Dalfox v3 批量扫描、无害浏览器标记和盲回调检测，并区分反射、存储与 DOM 证据。
value.en: An XSS testing toolkit combining XSStrike context analysis, Dalfox v3 batch scanning, harmless browser markers, and blind callbacks while separating reflected, stored, and DOM evidence.

value.zh: 使用正确的 xsstrike.py 文件名分别扫描单个参数和启用爬虫的站点范围，先设置 Scope、线程与延迟再运行爬取模式。
value.en: Use the correct xsstrike.py filename for a single-parameter scan and a crawler-assisted run, setting scope, thread count, and delay before crawling.

patches.value:
dalfox scan "http://{TARGET}/search?q=test" --format jsonl --output dalfox-single.jsonl
dalfox scan urls.txt --input-type file --format jsonl --output dalfox-batch.jsonl

value.zh: 按 Dalfox v3 语法扫描单 URL 和 URL 文件，并分别保存 JSONL，替代已过时的 url/pipe 子命令以便稳定归档发现。
value.en: Scan a single URL and a URL file with Dalfox v3 syntax and separate JSONL outputs, replacing obsolete url and pipe subcommands for stable result archiving.

value.zh: 无害浏览器执行标记
value.en: Harmless Browser Execution Markers

value.zh: 提供 Console 和 DOM Data Attribute 两类无外带执行标记，用于确认浏览器上下文执行，替代原先会发送 Cookie 的外部窃取 Payload。
value.en: Provide console and DOM data-attribute markers that confirm browser-context execution without exfiltration, replacing payloads that previously transmitted cookies externally.

value.zh: Dalfox 盲 XSS 回调
value.en: Dalfox Blind-XSS Callback

value.zh: 使用 Dalfox v3 内置 OOB 模式生成并轮询唯一盲 XSS 标记，保存 JSONL 结果，替代依赖固定第三方 XSS Hunter 域名的旧示例。
value.en: Use Dalfox v3's built-in OOB mode to generate and poll unique blind-XSS markers with JSONL output, replacing the fixed third-party XSS Hunter domain example.

value.zh: XSStrike 是基于上下文分析的 XSS 检测套件，支持反射与 DOM 分析、POST 数据、过滤器 Fuzz、参数发现和限深爬取，并可通过延迟控制请求。
value.en: XSStrike is a context-aware XSS detection suite supporting reflected and DOM analysis, POST bodies, filter fuzzing, parameter discovery, depth-limited crawling, and request pacing.

value.zh: 对单个 q 参数运行上下文分析和反射测试，先保留正常响应基线，再复核工具生成的候选 Payload 与实际 DOM 位置。
value.en: Run context analysis and reflection checks against one q parameter, retaining a normal-response baseline before reviewing generated candidates and their actual DOM positions.

value.zh: 通过 --data 提交 POST 表单字段，XSStrike 会据此选择请求方法；移除官方 CLI 不支持的 --method POST 参数。
value.en: Submit a POST form field with --data, which selects the request method in XSStrike, removing the unsupported --method POST argument.

value.zh: 启用较慢的 Fuzzer 观察过滤规则和 WAF 差异，设置固定延迟并与正常参数请求比较，避免将网络抖动视为过滤行为。
value.en: Enable the slower fuzzer to observe filter and WAF behavior, using a fixed delay and normal-parameter controls so network jitter is not mistaken for filtering.

value.zh: 从指定入口爬取最多三层并测试发现的参数，运行前限定同源 Scope、并发和请求延迟，避免爬到注销或状态修改链接。
value.en: Crawl up to three levels from the chosen entry point and test discovered parameters, constraining same-origin scope, concurrency, and delay to avoid logout or state-changing links.

value.zh: XXE 验证 Payload 集，覆盖本地实体、外部参数实体、回环 SSRF 和 SVG XML 解析，并使用低敏感标记与唯一回调区分文件读取和网络访问。
value.en: An XXE validation payload set covering local entities, external parameter entities, loopback SSRF, and SVG XML parsing with low-sensitivity markers and unique callbacks for separating file and network access.

value.zh: 声明指向低敏感主机名文件的外部实体并在根元素引用它，用于确认解析器是否允许本地文件实体展开。
value.en: Declare an external entity referencing the low-sensitivity hostname file and expand it in the root element to verify whether the parser permits local-file entities.

value.zh: 加载托管在唯一回调地址的外部参数实体 DTD，以 DNS/HTTP 请求证明解析器进行带外访问；DTD 内容应单独版本化和保存。
value.en: Load an external parameter-entity DTD from a unique callback host and use DNS or HTTP evidence to prove out-of-band parser access, versioning and retaining the DTD separately.

value.zh: 把外部实体指向实验环境的回环健康检查端点，验证 XML 解析器是否可发起服务端 HTTP 请求，避免默认访问云元数据。
value.en: Point an external entity at a loopback health endpoint in the lab to verify server-side HTTP access by the XML parser without targeting cloud metadata by default.

value.zh: 在完整 SVG 文档中引用主机名文件实体，用于检查上传、转换或预览流水线是否解析 DTD；浏览器直接显示 SVG 通常不会展开实体。
value.en: Reference the hostname-file entity in a complete SVG document to test upload, conversion, or preview pipelines that parse DTDs, noting that direct browser display usually does not expand entities.
